dimensionData:
- Overall size: 160 x 110 x 12 mm
- Corner hole pattern: 20 mm from side edges, 15 mm from top/bottom edges
- Slot width: 12 mm
- Slot center located from datum B only
- Counterbore diameter: 18 mm, depth 6 mm
- Counterbore pilot hole dimension repeated twice in notes
- No explicit slot length tolerance
- General tolerance: ISO 2768-mK
drawingNotes: Machined steel plate. Use datum A for primary setup. Critical mounting holes should maintain positional accuracy to slot centerline. Avoid over-constraining non-critical exterior edges.
